creator: fjpavon@gmail.com
text:
Hi Alexander.
The ums module is loaded, i use to attach another usb mouse to the laptop to work

root@claire:~ # usbconfig show_ifdrv | grep ouse
ugen0.6: <HP HP 128 Laser Wired Mouse> at usbus0, cfg=0 md=HOST spd=FULL (12Mbps) pwr=ON (100mA)
ugen0.6.0: ums0: <HP HP 128 Laser Wired Mouse, class 0/0, rev 2.00/1.18, addr 5>
ugen0.7: <Newmen Tech.,LTD 2.4G Wireless Mouse> at usbus0, cfg=0 md=HOST spd=FULL (12Mbps) pwr=ON (46mA)
ugen0.7.0: ukbd1: <Newmen Tech.,LTD 2.4G Wireless Mouse, class 0/0, rev 1.10/1.19, addr 6>

I don't know how the os decided that the device is a keyboard and it is not a mouse

I'm reading files in src/sys/dev/usb searching something very evident because my knowledge is close to 0, i feel like reading the necronomicon
